feed.title: Explyra Suite - Updates
feed.subtitle: Latest news, feature updates, and releases from Explyra.

entry.title: Advanced PWA & Service Worker Enhancements
entry.summary: Upgraded the Explyra PWA with advanced caching strategies, background sync, push notification support, and custom PWA widgets for a native-like experience.

entry.title: Explyra Services Page Launched
entry.summary: Explore our wide range of services including Software Development, Cloud Solutions, Cybersecurity, and AI Integration.

entry.title: Explyra Developer Summit 2026 Announced
entry.summary: Join us for the ultimate developer conference featuring deep dives into AI, Cloud, and the future of coding.

entry.title: Upcoming Explyra Suite Product Launch
entry.summary: Witness the launch of the next-generation Explyra Suite, our most powerful productivity and business management tool yet.

entry.title: Industry Solutions Hub Now Live
entry.summary: We've launched a comprehensive Solutions Hub featuring dedicated landing pages for Expense Management, CRM, Health, Learning, Developers, and our new Invoice Software.

entry.title: Contact Us Page Now Live
entry.summary: Get in touch with the Explyra team. Reach out for support, partnerships, bug reports, or any inquiries about the Explyra Suite.

entry.title: Support Explyra — Donation Page Launched
entry.summary: Support the Explyra Suite by donating via WhatsApp. Every contribution fuels server costs and scaling the ecosystem.

entry.title: Explyra Developer Tools Hub Launched
entry.summary: The Explyra Developers Hub is now live with Code Minifier, Hash Generator, Password Generator, and more tools.

entry.title: Explyra Health Manager Now Available
entry.summary: Track workouts, sleep, nutrition, and mental wellness with AI-powered recommendations.

entry.title: Explyra Learning Platform Launched
entry.summary: Expert-curated courses on Agentic AI, Prompt Engineering, and SEO.

entry.title: Welcome to the New Explyra Platform
entry.summary: We have launched our new PWA-enabled SaaS platform for enhanced productivity.

entry.title: Meet Our Technical Team
entry.summary: Spotlight on Mitanshu Bhasin, our lead developer driving cybersecurity and innovation at Explyra.
